response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators), but the resume shows no people-management experience, which is a hard requirement for this Level II manager role. There is no evidence of formal technical leadership, performance management, roadmap ownership, or organizational change leadership. Mobile exposure is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago. This profile fits a senior/staff IC role in engineering productivity far better than an engineering manager position.
strengths: Deep hands-on developer-tools experience: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, Selenium training, and MCP/agent tooling
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and mentorship inclination through workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No people-management experience; the role requires at least 2 years managing or leading a team
No evidence of formal technical leadership, strategic roadmap planning, or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform experience is shallow and dated (one iOS/Apple TV role in 2015-2016)

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure background
